title: Polygonifolia litoralis

This classification suggests that Polygonifolia litoralis is related to other plants in the same family. The genus Polygonifolia is often grouped within the tribe Persicarieae, which includes other buckwheat-related plants. At a higher taxonomic level, Polygonifolia litoralis is classified as a member of the order Caryophyllales. Further classification places it within the class Magnoliopsida, or flowering plants.
